autoattack.config.title: Auto Attack Settings
autoattack.config.enabled.tooltip: When enabled, automatically attacks entities when holding the attack button.
autoattack.config.maceContinuousSpam.too: When enabled, mace bypasses vanilla cooldown and attacks continuously. When disabled, mace waits for normal cooldown like other weapons.
autoattack.config.maceTickDelay.tooltip: Delay between mace attacks in ticks (only applies when spam is enabled). 0 = every tick, 20 = 1 second between hits.
